38.code: BTNodeptr insertBST(BTNodeptr p, int item, int depth)
38.reason: [Function definition appears after it is called in main, but no prototype error because there's a forward declaration. However, the real issue is that equal values are not handled: condition `else if (item > p->data)` skips insertion when `item == p->data`, violating BST rule that right child should handle >=. This causes missing nodes for duplicate values.]

49.reason: [This condition excludes equal values (`item == p->data`). According to problem description, right child should be used for values >= root. So this line should be `else` or `else if (item >= p->data)`. As written, duplicates are ignored, leading to incorrect tree structure and missing leaf nodes.]
